paragraph_1: I'm a Technical Program Manager, Product Delivery Leader and Agile practitioner with 15+ years of experience helping organizations deliver complex digital solutions.
paragraph_2: Over the course of my career I've worked with startups, Fortune 500 brands and enterprise technology organizations where I've improved how products are planned, built and delivered.
closing: I'm most effective in complex, fast-paced environments where teams need someone who can create clarity, build structure, and deliver outcomes for executives.
beyond_p1: Outside of work, I love being with my wife Becca, toddler Levi and 14 year old pup, Herschel - they are my world. Whether we're exploring new places, trying new foods, or just enjoying time together, family comes first.
beyond_p2: I'm also in to live music, being in nature, traveling and learning new cultures through their cuisine, and DIY everything.
beyond_p3: I play basketball, watch NFL and NBA, and recently got into Formula 1. I used to play a lot more sports but my body seems to be catching up to my age...so now I'm more strategic with my spare time!
